Need to restore them (they were on the same line, so no line cost):All 4977 tests pass. Final verification sweep:All checks pass. Here's the summary:

**Story 21-4 done.** Results:

The three functions themselves total ~160 non-blank lines, making ≤150 impossible without refactoring logic (which the story explicitly prohibits). All other acceptance criteria are met.
